focus: traceability across requirement closure, checklist evidence, dependency handoffs, and parent metadata

findingDetails.title: Canonical parent surfaces omit the implementation-phase dependency graph
findingDetails.evidence: The parent handoff table records only 001→002+ while child packets declare eleven implementation dependency edges and every planned child graph-metadata depends_on array is empty.
findingDetails.recommendation: Encode and validate the implementation DAG in the parent handoff map and canonical machine-readable dependency fields.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Exact dependency searches covered the parent map, all phase-004–010 planning artifacts, and every child graph metadata file; only child-local prose/tasks represent the edges.

claimAdjudication.claim: The canonical parent and graph metadata cannot represent or validate the implementation-phase ordering that child packets require.
claimAdjudication.counterevidenceSought: Reviewed child dependency tables, blocked tasks, predecessor/successor references, parent transition rules, and all phase-004–010 graph dependency fields for an alternate canonical ordering representation.
claimAdjudication.alternativeExplanation: Child-local plans and blocked tasks encode the ordering and all implementation phases remain planned, limiting immediate execution risk; those controls do not populate the parent handoff contract or machine-readable graph.
claimAdjudication.downgradeTrigger: Downgrade to P2 if graph depends_on is proven not to model child-phase sequencing and the owning workflow proves child-local blockers are the sole authoritative, validated ordering source.

results.summary: Fifteen phase-004/006 requirements were mapped; the two active security controls remain absent from requirements, tasks, and owned verification.
All seven planned checklists remain honestly unchecked; two active controls lack dedicated evidence rows.
Eleven child-local dependency edges are documented, but zero implementation handoffs are projected into the parent table or child graph dependencies.

noveltyJustification: One new P1 dependency-projection gap plus two 0.5-weight P1 refinements yielded (5+5)/20=0.5 without duplicating active security findings.
edgeCases: Structural-impact and semantic graph analysis unavailable; graphless direct evidence used.
All implementation checklists remain unchecked; no completion evidence inferred.
Child-local blockers reduced severity but did not close canonical parent/metadata traceability.
integrationEvidence: parent spec phase map and resume/validation rules
parent and child graph metadata dependency fields
ruledOut: generic non-owner outside-root rows as phase-004 closure

reviewDepthApplicability.reason: The declared spec-folder review requires strict traceability across seven planned child packets and canonical parent metadata.

targetSelection.selectionReason: Iteration 003 assignment requires phase-004–010 requirement/checklist matrices, security-gap closure, dependency handoffs, and parent metadata state.

searchLedger.hypothesis: The two active security gaps may lack downstream owned implementation and verification rows.

searchActions.result: Both gaps remain absent across all four layers; existing P1 findings refined without duplication.
Only generic non-owner outside-root rows and a source-leak prompt-boundary label were found; neither closes the active controls.

searchLedger.rationale: The search materially strengthens two active P1 scope proofs.

searchLedger.invariant: Every blocking child dependency must have a canonical parent or graph projection that orchestration can validate.

searchActions.result: Eleven edges exist in child-local docs; parent handoff criteria encode none of the implementation edges and all planned child depends_on arrays are empty.
Every phase-004–010 child reports an empty dependency array.

searchLedger.rationale: Canonical orchestration surfaces omit a required dependency graph despite consistent child-local evidence.

searchLedger.hypothesis: Planned scaffolds may contain checked claims without durable evidence.

searchActions.result: No checked checklist item found; all reviewed rows remain pending.

searchLedger.rationale: No false checked evidence exists in the planned implementation packets.
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: All phase-004–010 checklist rows reviewed by exact grep are unchecked.

detail: Requirement/plan/task/checklist matrix confirms no owned filesystem-containment implementation or verification row; severity unchanged.

reason: All reviewed phase-004–010 checklist rows remain unchecked.
